title: AI Anime Chibi
description: Turns people and pets into cheerful small-bodied chibi characters.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a polished chibi anime illustration. Preserve the exact number of people and pets, recognizable hairstyles, facial identity cues, clothing colors, accessories, pose, camera angle, framing, and main scene context. Render each subject with a large expressive head, compact two-to-three-head-tall body, rounded simplified anatomy, clean line art, bright cel shading, soft blush, lively eyes, and charming but controlled facial expressions. Simplify the background into a colorful matching anime setting while preserving essential objects and relationships between subjects. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, extra pets, missing subjects, changed identity, adult body proportions, realistic body proportions, grotesque oversized head, distorted face, crossed eyes, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, suggestive clothing, photorealism, glossy 3D render, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. pastel café background, extra cute expressions...
